x-enumeration-literals.name: Average
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is an average execution price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AverageOverride
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is an override of the average price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Combined
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is composed of the combined expenses (used in the UK market).

x-enumeration-literals.name: GrossOfAll
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is a gross execution price. The price is an all inclusive price, ie, including all charges, fees, and taxes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Limit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the limit price of a limit order, eg, a customer might put in a limit order to sell financial instruments at 67 or to buy at 60.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Net
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is a net price, ie, net only of local broker's commission, local fees and local taxes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NetDisclosed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is net to the disclosed client.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NetOfAll
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is a net price, ie, net of all charges, fees and taxes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NetUndisclosed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is net to the client undisclosed (used in the UK market).

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotionalGross
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is notional gross (used in the UK market).

x-enumeration-literals.name: ParValue
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is equal to the nominal or face value of the instrument.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RoundedAverage
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is a rounded average price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Stop
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is a stop price used in an order to buy. The order becomes a market order when the financial instrument trades at or above the stop price after the order is submitted. In an order to sell the order becomes a market order when the financial instrument trades at or below the stop price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bid
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the calculated bid price of a dual-priced fund (offer-bid prices), that is, the selling price of the units for the investor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Offer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the calculated offer price of a dual-priced investment fund (offer-bid prices), that is, the buying price of the units for an investor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NetAssetValue
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the net asset value per unit that is used either as a transacting price for a single-priced investment fund class, or as a notional price for the calculation of other prices.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the calculated creation price of a dual-priced investment fund (creation-cancellation prices) and the highest possible buying price of the units before the initial charge. The actual buying or offer price, which includes charges, will be higher.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancellation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the calculated cancellation price of a dual-priced investment fund (creation-cancellation price), and the lowest possible valuation of the units on any one-day. The actual selling or bid price is usually higher.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interim
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the non-official interim price given to an investor before the executed price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Swing
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the calculated net asset value price of a single-priced investment fund. The price is adjusted to take into account the dealing costs due to individual large deals, or due to a significant imbalance in volumes of subscriptions vs redemptions, as an alternative to dilution levy.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is another type of price, which is not explicitly defined.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mid
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the average price between the bid and offer prices.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reinvestment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the price used when reinvesting units after distribution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Switch
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the price used when transferring units between products.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DailyDividendRate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the net income of a financial instrument, calculated on each dealing day, and divided by all the units outstanding on that day.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the current market price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Indicative
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the estimated indicative price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Actual
x-enumeration-literals.description: True offer price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonAdjustedUnpublished
x-enumeration-literals.description: The original NAV before the price of the investment fund was swung.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guaranteed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is a guaranteed price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EstimatedNAV
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is an estimated net asset value per unit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: GrossAssetValue
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the gross asset value per unit and includes the performance fee per share. It is used as the transacting price for a fund with equalisation. GAVL price minus the NAVL price = performance fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EstimatedGAV
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the estimated gross asset value per unit and includes the performance fee per share. It is used as the transacting price for a fund with equalisation. GAVL price minus the NAVL price = performance fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SidePocketNAV
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is the estimated net asset value for the side pocket.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ask
x-enumeration-literals.description: Offer. Price for which seller is willing to sell item.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price selected as a crossing of an auction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price is calculated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Clean
x-enumeration-literals.description: Paid without accumulated interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dirty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Paid with accumulated interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Draw
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price selected as a result of a lottery/tiebreaker.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FairValue
x-enumeration-literals.description: Estimate of the potential market price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IndicativePaid
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reduced and partial execution based on high bids and ask orders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Kassa
x-enumeration-literals.description: Official declared price.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Paid
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price at which the trade was done.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RedemptionNAV
x-enumeration-literals.description: Net Asset Value (NAV) applicable to redemptions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price used for the settlement of futures and options.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Spread
x-enumeration-literals.description: The difference between bid and ask.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SubscriptionNAV
x-enumeration-literals.description: Net Asset Value (NAV) applicable to subscriptions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Price for tax declaration purpose.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxableIncomePerShareCalculated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specifies whether the fund calculates a taxable interest per share (TIS).
